sentence: 我百分之百相信他说的话。
pinyin: Wǒ bǎifēnzhībǎi xiāngxìn tā shuō de huà.
english: I absolutely believe what he said.

sentence: 我们昨晚通电话聊了一个小时。
pinyin: Wǒmen zuówǎn tōng diànhuà liáo le yī gè xiǎoshí.
english: We talked on the phone for an hour last night.

meaning: To float on the current, to drift along
pinyin: Shǔjià wǒmen qù hé lǐ piāoliú.
english: We went river rafting during the summer vacation.

meaning: 1. form of a Chinese character; 2. variant of 字型[zì xíng]
sentence: 学习汉字要注意字形的结构。
pinyin: Xuéxí Hànzì yào zhùyì zìxíng de jiégòu.
english: When learning Chinese characters, pay attention to the structure of character forms.

sentence: 他高声叫了一声，把大家吓到了。
pinyin: Tā gāoshēng jiào le yī shēng, bǎ dàjiā xià dào le.
english: He let out a loud shout and startled everyone.
